title: Pension Credit applications and awards: November 2025
body: " The Pension Credit Application and Awards: November 2025 was published on 27 November 2025. It represented the latest Pension Credit statistics available at the time of publication, covering the period from 3 April 2023 to 23 November 2025.   This statistical release provides data on Pension Credit applications and awards between April 2023 and November 2025.  It covers the number of weekly Pension Credit:   claims received claims cleared claims awarded   Pension Credit is extra money for pensioners to bring their weekly income up to a minimum amount. "
